title: `Orpah #6204
definition:
Orpah = "gazelle"

 1) a Moabite woman, wife of Chilion, the son of Naomi, and sister-in-
    law of Ruth
nasbUsage:

 1) a Moabite woman, wife of Chilion, the son of Naomi, and sister-in-
    law of Ruth

    NASB:  sister-in-law of Ruth
